类 LockingDatabase

java.lang.Object
com.zenith.database.Database
com.zenith.database.LockingDatabase
直接已知子类:
LiveDatabase, PlayerCountDatabase, PlaytimeDatabase, QueueLengthDatabase, RestartsDatabase, TablistDatabase, TimeDatabase
public abstract class LockingDatabase extends Database
Base class for databases that require a lock to be acquired before writing
